description: You are a senior survey researcher setting up a collaborative environment. Log in to LimeSurvey (admin / Admin123!) and create a new survey titled 'Consumer Brand Perception Study Q4 2024' containing a question group 'Brand Awareness' with at least two questions. Create two research assistant accounts: Julia Martinez (username: j.martinez, email: j.martinez@surveyresearchlab.org, password: Researcher1!) and Ryo Nakamura (username: r.nakamura, email: r.nakamura@surveyresearchlab.org, password: Researcher2!). Grant both users permissions to View/Read responses for the 'Consumer Brand Perception Study Q4 2024' survey, ensuring they cannot edit the survey structure.
